title: Why is Quantum Rei in the movies
display_title: Why is Quantum Rei in the movies
wikitext:
[]: Why is Quantum Rei in the movies?             Quote Post by azagroth » Mon Jul 07, 2025 4:14 pm Hello, firstly a thanks to the people of these boards. Years ago when I first watched Eva I was left with a lot of questions regarding the lore and visiting these boards provided me with answers and a lot of insightful analyses. Finally decided to make an account myself to ask this because if there is a thread discussing this I could not find it. So mainly why is Quantum Rei in the Rebuilds/NTE? My impression was that in the original she appeared to Shinji all those times (and Ritsuko/Misato before they died) is because she's god and exists outside of time. At first in 1.11 I thought it was a leftover from the original plan to have NTE only have a different ending but then while re-watching 3.0+1.0 she also appeared to Shinji while he was isolating himself in the abandoned building at the lake. Considering Rei does not become a god in the NTE is that just Rei II still stuck in Eva 1? That leaves the question of how she would be able to accomplish appearing there. A thought I had would need for me to mention that I see NTE both as a continuation and it's own thing. By that I mean that NTE is a whole different universe, there are 4 Adams (not one) and also Gendo discussing and having knowledge the other universes. Then I thought could the apparition be the original Rei from NGE? When she became god might she be able to check out other universes, so could the apparition actually be her? I'm probably over-analyzing but still can't get the thought out of my head. Also a thing I would ask is why do some people think that at the end of 3.0+1.0 Kaworu and Rei do not remember Shinji or what happened? It's stated that only Evangelions are being removed from reality, meaning he should not be altering anyone's memories. So basically everyone's just going to explore the new world now and that's why they are going in different directions, not that they have no memory and won't meet again. Or heck they're going home to rest, they've been through a lot as it was.

[]: Re: Why is Quantum Rei in the movies?             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Jul 08, 2025 2:49 pm This thought didn't occur to me until just now reading the OP, and I may have to reconsider it later, but I wonder if it has something to do with Gendo taking Unit-01/Rei II into the Minus Space in Thrice Upon a Time and performing quantum leaping. Rei could have been reaching out to Shinji through time from the future with each of her ghostly apparitions, slowly guiding him in the right direction toward his fate. Shinji uses this connection with Rei to instantly locate her in the Minus Space and take over piloting Unit-01. This would also be the puzzle piece that solves another layer of the mystery behind the title "Thrice Upon a Time", which is not only a cute reference to Evangelion's three endings, but seemingly a direct reference to the 1980 sci-fi novel of the same name which "considers the ramifications of sending messages into the past and/or receiving messages from the future, rather than the sending of physical objects through time." https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Thrice_Upon_a_Time

[]: Re: Why is Quantum Rei in the movies?             Quote Post by Weird_ocean » Tue Jul 08, 2025 3:33 pm azagroth wrote: So mainly why is Quantum Rei in the Rebuilds/NTE? My impression was that in the original she appeared to Shinji all those times (and Ritsuko/Misato before they died) is because she's god and exists outside of time. At first in 1.11 I thought it was a leftover from the original plan to have NTE only have a different ending but then while re-watching 3.0+1.0 she also appeared to Shinji while he was isolating himself in the abandoned building at the lake. Considering Rei does not become a god in the NTE is that just Rei II still stuck in Eva 1? That leaves the question of how she would be able to accomplish appearing there.

[]: Why is Quantum Rei in the movies?             Quote Post by azagroth » Mon Jul 07, 2025 4:14 pm Hello, firstly a thanks to the people of these boards. Years ago when I first watched Eva I was left with a lot of questions regarding the lore and visiting these boards provided me with answers and a lot of insightful analyses. Finally decided to make an account myself to ask this because if there is a thread discussing this I could not find it. So mainly why is Quantum Rei in the Rebuilds/NTE? My impression was that in the original she appeared to Shinji all those times (and Ritsuko/Misato before they died) is because she's god and exists outside of time. At first in 1.11 I thought it was a leftover from the original plan to have NTE only have a different ending but then while re-watching 3.0+1.0 she also appeared to Shinji while he was isolating himself in the abandoned building at the lake. Considering Rei does not become a god in the NTE is that just Rei II still stuck in Eva 1? That leaves the question of how she would be able to accomplish appearing there. A thought I had would need for me to mention that I see NTE both as a continuation and it's own thing. By that I mean that NTE is a whole different universe, there are 4 Adams (not one) and also Gendo discussing and having knowledge the other universes. Then I thought could the apparition be the original Rei from NGE? When she became god might she be able to check out other universes, so could the apparition actually be her? I'm probably over-analyzing but still can't get the thought out of my head. Also a thing I would ask is why do some people think that at the end of 3.0+1.0 Kaworu and Rei do not remember Shinji or what happened? It's stated that only Evangelions are being removed from reality, meaning he should not be altering anyone's memories. So basically everyone's just going to explore the new world now and that's why they are going in different directions, not that they have no memory and won't meet again. Or heck they're going home to rest, they've been through a lot as it was.
